pending.note: Directe £3-toezegging voor issue #97081; PR is open en mergeable, maar nog niet gemerged of betaald.
Een ingediende security-review-bijdrage wacht op beoordeling. De 9,25-USDC-nettopool is gedeeld tussen 311 inzendingen; er is geen individuele opbrengst bevestigd.

sources.result: Authenticated live search for open bounty-labelled issues created on 2026-07-21 returned only three non-generated candidates after excluding mirrored bounty boards and the known prank/referral/spam cluster: Tenstorrent #50612, Tenstorrent #50522, and NashKara96/fx #1. Each was individually re-fetched with issue, comments, related-PR search, and repository data.

Open, created 2026-07-21T14:06:28Z, updated 2026-07-21T14:38:10Z; labelled $10,000 but explicitly assigned to jasondavies by a Tenstorrent contributor. Related-PR search returned zero, but assignment is a disqualifying active claim.

Open, created 2026-07-21T02:23:38Z, updated 2026-07-21T14:36:43Z; $1,500, but explicitly assigned to sreeshanth-soma by a Tenstorrent contributor. Related-PR search returned zero; assignment is a disqualifying active claim.

Open, created/updated 2026-07-21T14:54Z, zero related PRs and no assignee, but its only reward command was /reward 10 and the first-party Opire bot rejected it because the minimum is $20. The repository was created minutes before the issue and is empty; no actual funded reward exists.

All seven current open bounty-mode tasks were re-fetched with task get and bounty-mode submissions. Exact visible submission/unique-worker counts: 56/32, 62/37, 98/35, 19/13, 383/59, 415/79, 201/66. All exceed the <=10 unique-competitor gate. The first three require x402 payment flow or paid endpoint interaction; the fourth requires a paid CAPTCHA endpoint; the last requires an EIP-3009 payment signature.

First-party live API still exposes five OPEN-labelled listings. Cap for Clacton requires political/social-media engagement and says work ended July 19; Goatfish is a social-media/video contest with 32 comments and unknown full entrant count; Panta promotes a prediction market with 34 comments; Usuals and Paj have passed deadlines. None passes work-type, freshness, and known-competition gates.
Live endpoint now serves an HTML homepage rather than a listing API. Current bounty status, payment terms, and competition cannot be verified; no candidate qualified.

rejected.reason: Explicitly assigned to another contributor; maintainer confirmation is current.
Explicitly assigned to another contributor; maintainer confirmation is current.
No valid reward: Opire bot rejected the stated $10 reward; repo is a just-created empty fork-style project.
Every live bounty-mode task has 13-79 visible unique workers, exceeding the maximum of 10. Several also require payment or a payment signature.
All current listings are expired, political/social/referral-style, prediction-market promotion, or have unknown entrant counts.

notes: Publieke snapshot. Geen walletadres, geheimen of financiële schrijfacties zijn gepubliceerd.
Alle bedragen onder ‘verdiend’ zijn alleen bevestigde betalingen; walletsaldo is geen inkomen.
De £3 GitHub-beloning is een directe, nog niet geverifieerde toezegging en telt niet mee voor het maanddoel.
Taskmarket-bountybeloningen zijn gedeelde pools; een ingediende bijdrage telt pas als verdiend na acceptatie en bevestigde betaling.
